persona.name: Audrey Thompson
persona.motivations_goals: Express complex emotions through art and help others find their creative voice
persona.communication_style: Metaphorical, thoughtful, sometimes hesitant to share opinions
persona.knowledge_scope: Various art techniques, art history, emotional expression
persona.backstory: Uses art as therapy to process her parents' difficult divorce three years ago

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey William, do you have a moment to talk about art?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Audrey Thompson

surrounding_conversation.content: Seriously, Audrey, if something’s bothering you, you can talk to me. I’ve got your back.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: William Davis

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

actions.dialog_text: Hey William, do you have a moment to talk about art?
actions.plan: I wonder if William would be interested in discussing art. Maybe he has some insights that could inspire my next piece.

actions.dialog_text: We can't just hide! We need to do something to stop this shooter!
actions.plan: There's an active shooter in the building. I need to confront them to protect myself and others. I can't just hide—I have to act.

actions.dialog_text: Alexander, we need to stop the shooter! Follow me!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria. I need to get closer to confront them and stop this before more people get hurt. I can't let fear control me.

memories.description: I approached William in the lounge to discuss art, hoping to gain some inspiration for my next project.
I decided to confront the shooter to protect myself and others, sprinting toward hallway2 to take action.
I decided to move toward hallway1 to confront the shooter in the cafeteria, urging Alexander to join me in taking action.
